title: Merge Subitems and Subitems Status columns
excerpt: Merging the Subitems tree icon/count with the Subitems Status progress bar would be a helpful way to reduce the column clutter on boards.

posts.author: whbraun (William Braun)
posts.cookedHtml: Merging the Subitems tree icon/count with the Subitems Status progress bar would be a helpful way to reduce the column clutter on boards.

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @whbraun - if you go to monday.labs and enable the new board experience the subitems column is removed with a “>” icon at the left of the row.

Thanks,
Mark
